name: Avocado Torey
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: "Le Ruth's" Restaurant, New Orleans, LA.
Cut the avocados in half and discard the pit. Scoop out the avocado meat with an ice-cream scoop, and shape into small balls. Place them on two plates lined with lettuce leaves. In a small bowl, whisk together the remaining ingredients, pour over the avocados, and serve.
